subject: Welcome to Mentora — Your admin account is ready
title: Welcome, {{firstName}}!
intro: Your Mentora admin account has been created. Below are your login credentials. Please log in and change your password immediately.
warning: This password is temporary. For your security, please change it as soon as you log in. Do not share these credentials with anyone.
footerNote: If you did not expect this email, please contact your system administrator immediately.
plainTextBody: Welcome {{firstName}}! Email: {{email}} Password: {{password}} Please change your password immediately.
